meaning: n.嗖嗖声vi.带着嗖嗖声挥动vt.使带着嗖嗖声地挥动adj.好看的,时髦的
examples: On the way out of LK Leon, one of their swish pairs of frames catches my eye, and I try them on: I can definitely see myself wearing glasses again.
She turned with a swish of her skirt.
We could hear the swish and gurgle of water against the hull.
The swish Hotel Baia di Nora is a 20-minute drive up the coast from Chia.
Today, many sassi have been restored and transformed into cosy abodes, restaurants and swish cave-hotels.
